identity.name: Kedorion
identity.description: A research company building the physical infrastructure of artificial intelligence. Raw, unpolished, functional, and futuristic.

fonts.usage: Labels, Metadata, timestamps, technical specs, button text

layout_grid.bento_grid: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-0 border-2 border-black bg-black

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white font-mono uppercase tracking-wider px-8 py-4 border-2 border-black hover:translate-x-[-4px] hover:translate-y-[-4px] hover:shadow-[6px_6px_0px_0px_#000] transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-black font-mono uppercase tracking-wider px-8 py-4 border-2 border-black hover:bg-black hover:text-white transition-all
buttons.outline: bg-transparent text-black font-mono uppercase border-2 border-black hover:bg-black hover:text-white

cards.default: bg-white border-2 border-black p-6 shadow-[6px_6px_0px_0px_#000] hover:shadow-[12px_12px_0px_0px_#000] transition-shadow
cards.sector: aspect-square flex flex-col justify-between border-r-2 border-b-2 border-black p-8 hover:bg-primary hover:text-white group transition-colors

inputs.default: bg-[#F2F2F2] border-2 border-black p-4 font-mono focus:ring-0 focus:border-primary focus:bg-white rounded-none placeholder:text-gray-500

metadata_bar.description: Top bar fixed or static. Monospace. Shows current time (UTC), location coordinates, and system status.
metadata_bar.style: bg-black text-white py-2 px-4 flex justify-between text-xs font-mono uppercase

elements: Product Slider: A carousel of 3 key products (Helios, Aegis, Bio). Auto-playing.

mission.content: Manifesto style. Large typography. No images.

sector_cards.interaction: Cards start grayscale. On hover: Full color, text turns white, background turns black/primary.

research_logs.elements: Date (Mono), Title, Status (Active/Archived). Hover reveals abstract data visualization.

newsletter.elements: Massive input field. 'SUBSCRIBE' button that looks like a launch switch.

join_us.layout: Split view. Left: Manifesto. Right: 2 Job Listings + Application Form.
join_us.form: Fields: Name, Email, CV Upload (Drag & drop zone with industrial dashed border).

instructions_to_main_agent: CONFIG: Update tailwind.config.js with the custom colors and fonts defined above.
GLOBAL CSS: Import the Google Fonts in src/index.css.
COMPONENT MODS: Modify Shadcn components to remove 'rounded-md' and soft shadows. Force 'rounded-none' and 'border-2 border-black'.
THEME: Ensure the background is #F2F2F2. Do not use white as the main background, use it for cards/sections only.
INTERACTION: Implement the 'Grayscale to Color' hover effect on ALL images.
LOGO: Use the SVG at /kedorion.svg. If missing, render a text fallback in Teko font.
FORMS: Ensure all forms (Contact, Job, Newsletter) have 'required' attributes and basic validation.
TESTING: Add data-testid to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, cards).

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES.animation: Avoid smooth elastic springs. Use linear or strong ease-out curves. Transitions should feel mechanical.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES.interactions: Hover states should be instant and high-contrast.
